name: zylith
description: Shielded CLMM for Bitcoin wrappers and stablecoins on Solana

scripts.dev:frontend: bun run env:sync && cd frontend && bun run dev
scripts.dev:asp: bun run env:sync && cd asp && cargo run
scripts.build: bun run build:sdk && bun run build:frontend && bun run build:asp && bun run build:contracts
scripts.build:contracts: cd contracts/anchor && anchor build && bun run scripts/deploy-metadata.mjs
scripts.circuits:build: cd circuits && mkdir -p build && bun run compile:all
scripts.check: bun run env:sync && bun run audit:active && bun run typecheck && bun run test:sdk && bun run test:asp && bun run test:contracts
scripts.test: bun run test:sdk && bun run test:asp && bun run test:contracts
scripts.clean: bun run clean:frontend && bun run clean:sdk && bun run clean:asp && bun run clean:contracts && bun run clean:circuits

author: Zylith Protocol
